task_title: Post Work Bundle Admission Ring V0.1

enhanced_ghost_evolve.intent: Servitor must teach internal organs strongly, deeply, repeatedly, and with evidence. Move context, rules, skills, tools, and validation logic into organ contracts, schemas, templates, checkers, receipts, and bundle indexes.

language_and_encoding_policy.taskpack_internal_files: ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM ONLY. No Cyrillic in root taskpack files.
language_and_encoding_policy.canonical_repo_artifacts: ENGLISH UTF8 NO_BOM for JSON, schemas, validators, machine receipts, and canonical repo artifacts.
language_and_encoding_policy.owner_facing_russian_runtime_output: Russian owner-facing live and final output is REQUIRED only after OFFICIO_AGENTIS role entry and must be routed through OFFICIO authority.
language_and_encoding_policy.cyrillic_in_taskpack: Forbidden in root taskpack files. Russian owner wording must be expressed as English policy inside the taskpack.
language_and_encoding_policy.localization_exception: OFFICIO_AGENTIS may require Russian owner-facing summaries after role entry; this exception does not apply to root taskpack files.

hard_gates: No final PASS without bundle admission evidence.
No final PASS without remote proof.
No final PASS if required post-work organ receipts are missing without explicit NOT_YET_IMPLEMENTED boundary.
No heavy local artifact dump into GitHub; GitHub receives indexes and receipts only unless small canonical artifacts are required.
Owner-facing final summary must be Russian after Officio role entry.
Commit and normal non-force push are required if task modifies repo files.
